description_long: This is a single-story, modern ranch-style house with a sprawling, horizontal layout and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The structure features a combination of flat and low-pitched gable roofs, with a large central garage and multiple rooms branching out on either side. The exterior walls are finished in a neutral beige color, complemented by white window frames and doors. There is a spacious wooden deck at the rear, adjacent to a standalone rectangular swimming pool, and a few palm trees add a touch of landscaping. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoor areas. The house includes a driveway, garage, and several entry points, making it suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story ranch house with a central garage, large windows, a wooden deck, and a backyard pool. The layout is open and horizontal, with beige walls and white accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main garage entrance, central entryway, and symmetrical wings extending on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, backyard pool, and rear-facing rooms with large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the house, the expansive deck, and the pool set apart from the main structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the deck, pool, and the arrangement of rooms along the back of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a wide garage door, standard front door, and minimal overhang; no prominent porch or columns.
